issuer_name_as_stated: EMKAY SHARE AND STOCK BROKERS LIMITED
extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is provided, so there are no table-based against-versus-by rows to count; the narrative discloses four income-tax matters against the Company for assessment years 2000-01 through 2003-04, with no criminal or statutory/regulatory enforcement matters stated. The quantified aggregate against the Company is the stated Rs. 44.23 lakhs of income-tax demands, converted to Rs. 0.4423 crore; no subsidiary amount or promoter/director personal matter is disclosed. The contingent-liabilities table is in Indian rupees lakhs and is dated September 30, 2005, but it does not provide an overall contingent-liabilities Total row, so no total is extracted rather than summing line items. Customer concentration is described only qualitatively as a major portion of business derived from a few customers, with no company-wide percentage, fiscal period, or denominator disclosed. The source unit is lakhs; the conversion used is 1 crore = 100 lakhs, so Rs. 44.23 lakhs / 100 = Rs. 0.4423 crore.
